response.justification: Despite extensive software development experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise on Windows platforms and has no clear exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems, with only a brief, unrelated C++ mention from 2014–2015 in a non-financial context.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems with CI/CD and testing practices
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: No evidence of 5–10 years of professional C++ on Windows as required
Zero mention of fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain experience
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or SQL Server/Oracle
